description_long: A young adult woman stands upright, dressed in a fitted crop top and short shorts with a studded belt. She wears high-heeled ankle boots and has a thigh strap accessory on her right leg. Her arms are relaxed at her sides, and her body build is slender and athletic. The figure's hair is cut in a straight, shoulder-length bob, framing her face. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban style suitable for city environments.
description: A slender young woman in a crop top, shorts, and high-heeled boots, with a studded belt and thigh strap, standing upright with a modern urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crop top, shorts, studded belt, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the body, the curve of the crop top, and the high-heeled boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crop top, shorts, belt, and straight bob hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thigh strap accessory and the side profile of the boots and outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: urban crop top and short shorts with a studded belt and thigh strap accessory
